arabicText: حمٓ
translationText: Ha, Meem.

arabicText: وَٱلْكِتَٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
translationText: By the Enlightening Scripture.

arabicText: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍۢ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
translationText: We have revealed it on a Blessed Night-We have warned.

arabicText: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
translationText: In it is distinguished every wise command.

arabicText: أَمْرًۭا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
translationText: A decree from Us. We have been sending messages.

arabicText: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
translationText: As mercy from your Lord. He is the Hearer, the Knower.

arabicText: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
translationText: Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if you know for sure.

arabicText: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
translationText: There is no god but He. He gives life and causes death-your Lord and Lord of your ancestors of old.

arabicText: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ يَلْعَبُونَ
translationText: Yet they play around in doubt.

arabicText: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translationText: So watch out for the Day when the sky produces a visible smoke.

arabicText: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
translationText: Enveloping mankind; this is a painful punishment.

arabicText: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
translationText: "Our Lord, lift the torment from us, we are believers."

arabicText: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translationText: But how can they be reminded? An enlightening messenger has already come to them.

arabicText: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌۭ مَّجْنُونٌ
translationText: But they turned away from him, and said, "Educated, but crazy!"

arabicText: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
translationText: We will ease the punishment a little, but you will revert.

arabicText: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
translationText: The Day when We launch the Great Assault-We will avenge.

arabicText: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ كَرِيمٌ
translationText: Before them We tested the people of Pharaoh; a noble messenger came to them.

arabicText: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌۭ
translationText: Saying, "Hand over God's servants to me. I am an honest messenger to you."

arabicText: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translationText: And, "Do not exalt yourselves above God. I come to you with clear authority.

arabicText: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
translationText: I have taken refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

arabicText: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
translationText: But if you do not believe in me, keep away from me."

arabicText: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌۭ مُّجْرِمُونَ
translationText: He appealed to his Lord: "These are a sinful people."

arabicText: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
translationText: "Set out with My servants by night-you will be followed.

arabicText: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّغْرَقُونَ
translationText: And cross the sea quickly; they are an army to be drowned."

arabicText: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
translationText: How many gardens and fountains did they leave behind?

arabicText: وَزُرُوعٍۢ وَمَقَامٍۢ كَرِيمٍۢ
translationText: And plantations, and splendid buildings.

arabicText: وَنَعْمَةٍۢ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَٰكِهِينَ
translationText: And comforts they used to enjoy.

arabicText: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
translationText: So it was; and We passed it on to another people.

arabicText: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
translationText: Neither heaven nor earth wept over them, nor were they reprieved.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
translationText: And We delivered the Children of Israel from the humiliating persecution.

arabicText: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
translationText: From Pharaoh. He was a transgressing tyrant.

arabicText: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translationText: And We chose them knowingly over all other people.

arabicText: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَٰٓؤٌۭا۟ مُّبِينٌ
translationText: And We gave them many signs, in which was an obvious test.

arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
translationText: These people say.

arabicText: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
translationText: "There is nothing but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

arabicText: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
translationText: Bring back our ancestors, if you are truthful."

arabicText: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍۢ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
translationText: Are they better, or the people of Tubba and those before them? We annihilated them. They were evildoers.

arabicText: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
translationText: We did not create the heavens and the earth and what is between them to play.

arabicText: مَا خَلَقْنَٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: We created them only for a specific purpose, but most of them do not know.

arabicText: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translationText: The Day of Sorting Out is the appointed time for them all.

arabicText: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًۭى شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
translationText: The Day when no friend will avail a friend in any way, and they will not be helped.

arabicText: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
translationText: Except for him upon whom God has mercy. He is the Mighty, the Merciful.

arabicText: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
translationText: The Tree of Bitterness.

arabicText: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
translationText: The food of the sinner.

arabicText: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
translationText: Like molten lead; boiling inside the bellies.

arabicText: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
translationText: Like the boiling of seething water.

arabicText: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
translationText: Seize him and drag him into the midst of Hell!

arabicText: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
translationText: Then pour over his head the suffering of the Inferno!

arabicText: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
translationText: Taste! You who were powerful and noble.

arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
translationText: This is what you used to doubt.

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍۢ
translationText: As for the righteous, they will be in a secure place.

arabicText: فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
translationText: Amidst gardens and springs.

arabicText: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍۢ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
translationText: Dressed in silk and brocade, facing one another.

arabicText: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍۢ
translationText: So it is, and We will wed them to lovely companions.

arabicText: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
translationText: They will call therein for every kind of fruit, in peace and security.

arabicText: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
translationText: Therein they will not taste death, beyond the first death; and He will protect them from the torment of Hell.

arabicText: فَضْلًۭا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
translationText: A favor from your Lord. That is the supreme salvation.

arabicText: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
translationText: We made it easy in your language, so that they may remember.

arabicText: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
translationText: So wait and watch. They too are waiting and watching.
